completed_tasks.name: cache.status() — add RIS fields
completed_tasks.details: status() now returns ris_exists, ris_git_head, ris_last_updated_at, ris_is_stale, current_git_head. Added _get_git_head() private helper. Lazy import of load_ris avoids circular dependency.

completed_tasks.name: cache.clear() — add --include-ris flag
completed_tasks.details: clear(repo_root, *, clear_ris=False). CLI: --include-ris flag. Confirmation prompt now says '(RIS preserved — use --include-ris to also clear it)'.

completed_tasks.name: get_cold_start_context() — add provenance fields
completed_tasks.details: Added _has_uncommitted_changes() helper. cold-start now emits: current_git_head, has_uncommitted_changes, cache_source='RIS', data_scope='RIS_BOOTSTRAP', api_surface_complete (false for Java repos with empty endpoint index).

completed_tasks.name: _cache provenance block in all JSON outputs
completed_tasks.details: _inject_cache_meta() helper added. Both cache-hit path (L2/L1) and fresh analysis path inject _cache block: cache_source, git_head_at_generation, current_git_head, is_stale, has_uncommitted_changes, generated_at, data_scope.

completed_tasks.name: Bug 7 — controller_methods label lie fixed
completed_tasks.details: controller_methods was always == controller_classes (deduplicated by path). Removed methods field from controllers dict. Note now says 'X controller classes detected (use sourcecode endpoints for per-method HTTP surface)'.

completed_tasks.name: Bug 6 — api_surface_complete field in cold-start
completed_tasks.details: For Java repos with empty endpoints: api_surface_complete=false. Non-Java or Java-with-endpoints: api_surface_complete=true. Agents no longer treat [] as 'no endpoints exist'.

completed_tasks.name: Improvement D — cache freshness CLI + check_freshness MCP
completed_tasks.details: 'sourcecode cache freshness <path> [--json]' reports fresh, current_git_head, ris_git_head, delta_commits, has_uncommitted_changes, ris_last_updated_at. MCP tool check_freshness delegates to it.

completed_tasks.name: Improvement F — get_delta auto-since
completed_tasks.details: Empty/omitted since triggers _auto_since(): tries git merge-base HEAD origin/main, then origin/master, falls back to HEAD~1. Removes INVALID_ARGUMENT for empty since.

completed_tasks.name: Improvement H — Java-only markers in MCP
completed_tasks.details: get_endpoints docstring now says JAVA ONLY prominently. get_ir_summary and get_impact_context already had Java only in docstring.

completed_tasks.name: Improvement B — cache warm documents RIS rebuild
completed_tasks.details: Docstring updated. Success message now says 'Cache warmed (L1/L2 + RIS rebuilt).'

human_actions_pending.context: Untracked since session 29. No action needed to unblock.

decisions.decision: cache.clear() default preserves RIS — --include-ris needed to also clear it
decisions.rationale: RIS is the persistent cold-start index, not a hot cache. Clearing it accidentally would break cold-start for agents. Default-preserve is correct; prompt and flag make it explicit.
Was always equal to controller_classes — adding noise. Real per-method count requires endpoints command which scans @GetMapping etc. per method.

decisions.decision: get_delta auto-since uses merge-base, not HEAD~1
decisions.rationale: HEAD~1 is almost always wrong for PRs with multiple commits. merge-base with origin/main gives the correct diff scope for PR review workflows.

decisions.decision: api_surface_complete=false only for Java repos with empty endpoints
decisions.rationale: Non-Java repos correctly have no endpoints — empty is correct for them. Only Java/Spring repos need this signal to distinguish 'not indexed yet' from 'genuinely no endpoints'.
